Class Tile

java.lang.Object
environment.tile.Tile
Direct Known Subclasses:
GrassTile, MountainTile, RiverTile, VoidTile
public abstract class Tile extends Object
Represents a single tile on the game board. Handles the loading of multiple sprite variants and uses deterministic Voronoi noise to cache and assign a visual variant based on board coordinates.

  • Method Details

    • getImage

      public javafx.scene.image.Image getImage(int row, int col)
      Returns the appropriate sprite image for a specific board coordinate. Uses a cached Voronoi calculation to ensure the same tile always looks the same.
      Parameters:
      row - The row coordinate of the tile on the board
      col - The column coordinate of the tile on the board
      Returns:
      The specific Image variant to draw

    • getCost

      public int getCost()
